title: Q2.5 retry, recovery, and evidence review
body: The runtime restores weights and both AdamW moment arrays before each retry, restores the frozen clipped gradient, and reuses the proposed committed-update index. Attempt schema v3 records every scale, all six replay losses, composite decision, selected scale, and rollback digest. The dedicated gate proves full-scale and scaled commits plus byte-identical uninterrupted and 4+4 recovery. Checkpoint mode 4 rejects cross-mode resume.
claims: The implementation cannot skip an earlier feasible trial without checker failure.
Internal trials do not consume attempt budget or advance the sampler.
Promotion remains inaccessible unless a jointly feasible public checkpoint exists.
